Reason I love you: your heart has a softness that makes the world feel less heavy.
Reason I love you: you are beautiful, yes, but you are also kind in ways that stay with me.
Reason I love you: even when we are far apart, you still make me feel connected.
አንቺን የምወድሽ ምክንያት: ልብሽ ቆንጆ ነው፣ ነፍስሽም ሞቃት ነው።
Reason I love you: you make ordinary messages feel like little pieces of home.
Reason I love you: I can be silly with you and serious with you, and both feel safe.
Reason I love you: your existence makes me want to become more patient, more gentle, more present.
Reason I love you: because loving you feels like something my heart recognized before I had words for it.
